prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt) forged internals: Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 87mm forged pistons with 9.0:1 compression ratio for 35+ psi boost handling, paired with ACL Race Series main and rod bearings for durability under extreme load.

Turbocharger upgrade: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with .82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate to eliminate boost creep, calibrated for 450-500 whp on E85 with a custom 3.5" V-band downpipe and Vibrant 1040 resonated race muffler.

Fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and Radium Engineering dual feed fuel rail with -8AN feed lines, controlled via AEM Infinity 7 standalone ECU with flex-fuel sensor and 3-bar MAP sensor for precise E85 tuning and boost-by-gear strategies.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Eclipse 4G specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, overfenders, and rear quarter panels, paired with a custom 2.5" extended wheelbase conversion using custom subframe spacers and extended axles for aggressive stance and 10.5" wheel fitment.

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with integrated 3" cowl induction scoop and custom ducting to the GTX3582R intercooler, finished in matte PPG 'Gunmetal Metallic' with OEM-style Mitsubishi decals in 'Ralliart Blue' for a stealth OEM+ look.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, Swift Springs (8K front/10K rear), and custom top mounts for camber adjustment, paired with Cusco Type RS 22mm front and 24mm rear adjustable sway bars and polyurethane bushings for chassis rigidity.
